title: andropogon virginicus subsp. genuinus
intro: Andropogon virginicus subsp. genuinus, also known as broom sedge, is a subspecies of grass native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Andropogon virginicus subsp. genuinus include reducing fever, treating skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
